title: botrychium australe var. erosum
intro: Botrychium australe var. erosum, also known as the slender grape fern, is a type of perennial fern native to the mountainous regions of the United States and Mexico. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions. The health benefits of Botrychium australe var. erosum are believed to include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as providing antioxidant protection and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
